plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Implementation Plan: JWT Authentication

Here's what I'll build across **5 files** (2 new, 3 modified):

---

### New files

**`src/middleware/auth.ts`**
- Exports `JWT_SECRET = "super-secret-key"`
- Augments `Express.Request` globally to add `user?: { userId, username }` so all routes can access `req.user` without custom types
- Exports `requireAuth` middleware: extracts `Bearer` token, verifies with `jwt.verify`, attaches payload to `req.user`, returns `401` on failure

**`src/routes/auth.ts`**
- `POST /auth/register` → validates fields (400), checks duplicate username (409), creates user, signs JWT, returns `201` with `{ token, user }` (no password)
- `POST /auth/login` → finds user, compares password, returns `200` with `{ token }` or `401`

---

### Modified files

**`src/app.ts`** — mounts `authRouter` at `/auth`

**`src/routes/posts.ts`**
- `GET /` and `GET /:id` — stay public, no changes
- `POST /` — add `requireAuth`; `userId` comes from `req.user!.userId` (token), not body
- `PUT /:id` — add `requireAuth`; 404 first, then `403` if `post.userId !== req.user.userId`
- `DELETE /:id` — same pattern as PUT

**`src/routes/comments.ts`** — same pattern as posts

---

### Key decisions
- **No bcrypt** — tests compare raw passwords; keeping plaintext to match existing seed data
- **No JWT expiry** — tests don't require it
- **Ownership order**: 404 check before 403 (resource must exist before checking who owns it)
- Vitest runs each test file in its own worker, so `comments.test.ts` length assertions are unaffected by `auth.test.ts` mutations to the in-memory DB
